summary: Captured ~62k log lines across a 78-minute window. Server emitted 142 cache-miss warnings concentrated between 16:21 and 16:28, followed by a successful cache rehydration. One transport disconnect at 16:42 (recovered within 300ms). No errors above WARN level after the recovery.
findings: Cache miss rate spiked from baseline 3% to 41% between 16:21 and 16:28, returning to baseline after rehydration
Single transport disconnect at 16:42, recovered cleanly with 0 queued tool calls dropped
Heartbeat cadence held steady at ~1/minute throughout the window — no thread starvation

summary: Quieter window than the previous discard. ~52k lines, dominated by heartbeat traffic (one ping/minute) and routine tool calls. No cache anomalies. No transport events. Three edit_files tool calls completed without error.
findings: No WARN or ERROR lines in this window
tool_call breakdown: 14 read_files, 8 run_shell_command, 3 edit_files, 1 search_codebase

summary: Notable error window. 38 ERROR lines clustered between 22:14 and 22:31, all 'OAuth token refresh failed: 401 from authorization_server'. Recovery via re-authorization at 22:32. Subsequent activity was normal.
findings: 38 ERROR-level lines in this window — investigate auth server availability between 22:14 and 22:31
Single root cause: repeated OAuth token refresh attempts received 401s before successful re-auth at 22:32
One transport disconnect at 22:32 likely tied to the auth re-handshake (recovered)
